text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a meeting with Mejiro Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Well, good day to you, little bird. And hello
there, bunny rabbit. Greetings to you as well,
cute squirrel. ♪ Teehee...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, but did you happen to see where all
the woodland creatures went? The forest recital is
about to begin, and we've rehearsed ever so
much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer? You can't perform your part without
your tambourine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright seems so sleep-deprived that she
can no longer distinguish dreams from reality...
